channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: These two cars, , are parked illegally regulaly inside the estate. One at least has received a few fines but, 4th March
item.description:
Two residents at pynfolds persist in parking their car illegally - as shown on pic. They park over night escaping any day control. Few fines they received is not deterring them. They are parked their now, were over night

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Jamaica Road, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Church Lane end of Floyd Road, 4th March
item.description:
Biffa bins overflowing (AGAIN) and black bags dumped alongside. This is an ongoing problem and no action seems to be taken as this has been reported frequently over at least the last year.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Charlton Church Lane, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Untaxed and uninsured polluting vehicle, 4th March
item.description:
There's a Mini cooper parked just outside "The boxing Academy" (1 Monteagle Way, London E5 8PH). It's untaxed and uninsured. It's on Hackney land. Its owner is polluting the whole area by spilling car oil on the pathway. It needs to be impounded.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Monteagle Way, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Around litter bin at junction of Church Lane and Wellington Gardensardens, 4th March
item.description:
Several black bin bags and clothing on pavement.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wellington Gardens, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on Dovercourt Road street sign, 4th March
item.description:
Graffiti on Dovercourt Road street sign

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Woodwarde Road, Dulwich Village, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple piles of rubbish between Nadine Steet and Wellington Gardens, 4th March
item.description:
Outside 66 Church Lane: duvet. Outside 60/62: rubbish bag Outside 54: rubbish bag. It is always the same at these properties and no action is ever taken.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Charlton Church Lane, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:
Flytipping in front of full clothes recycling bank outside North Dulwich station on Red Post Hill

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Red Post Hill, Dulwich Village, Greater London

item.title: Bathu Superstore Litter, 4th March
item.description:
Bathu Superstore constantly littering their delivery packaging outside pavement and on road. Has now started to spread down the street.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Friendly Place, Lewisham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Top of torbay, 4th March
item.description:
Bagged waste

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Dyne Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Dog Faeces, 4th March
item.description:
Numerous amounts of Dog Faeces being left towards the end of Shafton Road by two male residents. Residents are angry at having to watch their step.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Shafton Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytip painting, 4th March
item.description:
Someone has left a painting on the street

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Murray Avenue, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter everywhere, 4th March
item.description:
Once again, litter and trash built up all along Faversham Road. There are bottles, discarded vapes, cardboard and other various items on the pavement, road and street verges. There is also a discarded pram by the shop which has been there for 3 days. This road needs to be on the regular street sweeping rotation as often as the High St - people constantly drop rubbish on it because of the commercial businesses on the corner. Please arrange a thorough and deep clean again - and notify the relevant department of the need for regular cleaning.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Faversham Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping at the top of Ledrington rd, 4th March
item.description:
Fly tipping

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Anerley Hill, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Human excrement, 4th March
item.description:
Large amount of what appears to be human excrement on pavement in front of stand toilets not able to enter stand toilets without walking through it
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 23b, Denmark Hill, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole in road, 4th March
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 79, Compayne Gardens, South Hampstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumped again including food waste, 4th March
item.description:
Time and time again rubbish is dumped here. I could report it everyday but I don't have time. Is there no way we can get more bins here or a public bin as people just dump their rubbish on top of the bags left there?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Silvester Street, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple areas of dog fouling, 4th March
item.description:
I walk my dog here most days and the dog fouling in this area has become increasingly worse. This morning there were 9 different areas where faeces had not been picked up. This has been getting worse for about a year now.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Smalley Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
